introText: Hello, I’m Josh and my interests are learning Japanese, bouldering and game development.
These all share in my passion for solving challenging problems as they require you to grow to overcome them.
I found software development has many of these problems with there always being something new to learn.
My previous work as a teacher has helped my communication and flexibility, as I learnt how to teach complex topics for a range of people with different backgrounds and abilities.
I am now looking forward to trying new methods of combining my teaching experience with software development to grow as a developer (with an interest towards DevOps) and support my team members.
